IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: CREATE AND SUSTAIN HIGH-QUALITY AFFORDABLE HOUSING COMMUNITIES THAT ADVANCE OPPORTUNITY FOR ALL.
IRS990.MissionDesc: EDEN HOUSING, INC. CREATES AND SUSTAINS HIGH-QUALITY AFFORDABLE HOUSING COMMUNITIES THAT ADVANCE OPPORTUNITY FOR ALL.
IRS990.Desc: EDEN HOUSING HAS DEVELOPED OR ACQUIRED OVER 12,936 AFFORDABLE HOMES FOR LOW-INCOME INDIVIDUALS AND FAMILIES, AND CURRENTLY OWNS 166 PROPERTIES THROUGHOUT CALIFORNIA. WE ARE DOING OUR PART TO TACKLE THE HOUSING CRISIS IN CALIFORNIA-CURRENTLY SERVING MORE THAN 22,000 LOW-INCOME RESIDENTS WITH A WAIT LIST OF 30,000 HOUSEHOLDS LOOKING FOR AN AFFORDABLE HOME.

Form990PartVIISectionAGrp.TitleTxt: CHIEF OF REAL ESTATE DEV. AND EXEC. VP
SENIOR VP OF PEOPLE AND CULTURE
DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY OPER. & QUALITY MGT.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART II, LINE 10, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ESCROW LIABILITY AMOUNTS ON FORM 990, PART X, LINE 21 CONSIST OF TENANT SECURITY DEPOSITS.

EHI AND THE OTHER NOT-FOR-PROFIT CORPORATIONS ARE TAX-EXEMPT PURSUANT TO THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE SECTION 501(C)(3) AND RELATED CALIFORNIA CODE SECTIONS. STEVENSON LAND CORPORATION IS TAX-EXEMPT PURSUANT TO THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE SECTION 501(C)(2) AND RELATED CALIFORNIA CODE SECTIONS. THE INCOME OR LOSS FROM THE PARTNERSHIPS IS REPORTED BY THE PARTNERS ON THEIR INCOME TAX RETURNS. THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ALSO INCLUDE CERTAIN CORPORATIONS THAT ARE NOT TAX-EXEMPT. NO INCOME TAX PROVISION HAS BEEN INCLUDED IN THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS FOR THE SINGLE MEMBER LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANIES WHICH ARE GENERALLY CONSIDERED DISREGARDED ENTITIES. THE INCOME OR LOSS OF THE LLCS IS INCLUDED IN THE TAX RETURNS OF THEIR RESPECTIVE SOLE MEMBERS. ONLY THE ANNUAL CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY MINIMUM TAX AND THE ANNUAL FEE APPEAR AS EXPENSE IN THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS. EHI AND AFFILIATES BELIEVE THAT THEY HAVE APPROPRIATE SUPPORT FOR ANY TAX POSITIONS TAKEN, AND AS SUCH, DO NOT HAVE ANY UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS THAT ARE MATERIAL TO THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS. EHI AND AFFILIATES' FEDERAL AND STATE INCOME TAX AND INFORMATION RETURNS FOR THE FISCAL YEARS ENDED 2020 THROUGH 2023 ARE SUBJECT TO EXAMINATION BY REGULATORY AGENCIES, GENERALLY FOR THREE YEARS AND FOUR YEARS AFTER THEY WERE FILED FOR FEDERAL AND STATE, RESPECTIVELY.

FundraiserActivityInfoGrp.ActivityTxt: FUNDRAISING RESEARCH, REPORTS, COMMUNICATIONS, MEETINGS ETC

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: GRANTS TO SUPPORT AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTIVITIES
GRANTS TO SUPPORT AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTIVITIES
GRANTS TO SUPPORT AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTIVITIES
GRANTS TO SUPPORT AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTIVITIES
GRANTS TO SUPPORT AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTIVITIES
GRANTS TO SUPPORT AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTIVITIES

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EDEN HOUSING INC.'S GRANTS ARE GENERALLY MADE TO RELATED ENTITIES THAT ARE CONTROLLED BY THE ORGANIZATION.

EACH YEAR, EDEN HOUSING, INC. AWARDS QUALIFIED RESIDENTS WITH MONETARY ASSISTANCE TO MEET THEIR ACADEMIC AND CAREER GOALS. THE CRITERIA USED TO SELECT AWARDEES INCLUDE ACADEMIC ACHIEVEMENT, NEED, COMMUNITY SERVICE, AND SCHOLASTIC AND PERSONAL REFERENCES.

RltdOrgOfficerTrstKeyEmplGrp.TitleTxt: CHIEF OF REAL ESTATE DEV. AND EXEC.
SENIOR VP OF PEOPLE AND CULTURE

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FOLLOWING INDIVIDUALS RECEIVED REIMBURSEMENT FOR THEIR GYM MEMBERSHIP: TATIANA BLANK MARLAND TAYLOR

THE BELOW INDIVIDUALS LISTED ON PART VII, SECTION A, LINE 1A RECEIVED BONUSES IN CALENDAR YEAR 2024. THESE BONUSES WERE NOT CONTINGENT ON THE REVENUES OR NET EARNINGS OF THE ORGANIZATION. LINDA MANDOLINI - $58,830 TATIANA BLANK - $62,924 ANDREA OSGOOD - $55,369 DARNELL WILLIAMS - $65,287 LISA RYDHOLM - $50,478 TIMOTHY GREEN - $40,432 MARLAND TAYLOR - $39,089 JEFFREY MOLINE - $40,047 JANET ACEVEDO - $29,258 LORENZO JONES - $28,730 OYESHOLA OLATOYE - $68,010
THE NUMBER ON COLUMN (B) REPRESENTS THE NUMBER OF CONTRIBUTIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A COMPLETE COPY OF THE FORM 990 RETURN IS PRESENTED TO THE AUDIT COMMITTEE FOR A SUMMARY REVIEW WITH MANAGEMENT. A COMPLETE COPY OF THE FORM 990 RETURN IS PROVIDED TO THE FULL BOARD OF DIRECTORS FOR THEIR REVIEW AND COMMENTS BEFORE IT IS FILED WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EACH BOARD MEMBER IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE A CONFLICT OF INTEREST DISCLOSURE QUESTIONNAIRE ANNUALLY. IF A BOARD MEMBER HAS ANY CONFLICT OF INTEREST, THE BOARD MEMBER WOULD NEED TO RECUSE HIMSELF/HERSELF FROM ANY DECISIONS REGARDING A CONFLICT AREA.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: WRITTEN EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT, COMPENSATION SURVEY OR STUDY, AND FORM 990 OF OTHER ORGANIZATIONS WERE USED TO ESTABLISH COMPENSATION OF THE ORGANIZATION'S CEO/CFO AND OFFICERS. BOARD OR COMPENSATION COMMITTEE'S APPROVAL IS ALSO REQUIRED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ASPEN MAPLE TREES LLC BEGINNING NET ASSETS -57. MULBERRY GARDENS SENIOR LLC BEGINNING NET ASSETS 100. TRANSFER OF EDEN DEL NIDO LLC ASSETS AND LIABILITIES TO EDEN DEL NIDO LP 29,324,556. REGIONAL STREET LLC BEGINNING NET ASSETS 153,609.
